series_metadata.series_description: Files include agendas, attendance sheets, training announcement, handouts, trainer evaluations, talking points on child care or Step Up To Quality rules or procedures or policies related to eligibility or payment, child care scenarios for small group discussion, overall training presentation (PowerPoint), and 3rd party resource materials related to child care, Step Up To Quality, Counties or families.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office 3 years, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain in office 3 years, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
